result.stdout:
clizer
  Small CLI for moving and resizing windows.

Usage:
  clizer [options] <name>

Arguments:
  <name>  App name.

Options:
  -s, --size <size>          The size of the window. Eg. 800*600 
  -l, --location <location>  The location of the window. Eg. 100,150
  --save                     Save as default.
  --load                     Load as default.
  --list-windows             List all found windows.
  --list-defaults            List defaults.
  --version                  Show version information
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information
